summary: Sprint 4 Quarantine Triage verification complete. T0 Battle tests: 71 passed, 1 data-dependent skip. T1 CI curated tests: 241 passed. Quarantine mechanism working correctly - individual tests show as 'skipped' not 'failed'. ADR-003 Room-Type Inventory Strategy document exists (328 lines).

critical_code_review_comments: Quarantine hook in conftest.py (lines 20-31) correctly auto-skips tests listed in quarantine_manifest.py
52 individual tests are skip-marked via quarantine_manifest.py across 6 categories: stale_room_locks, stale_fixtures, changed_api, changed_implementation, external_dependency, meta-test
7 test files fully moved to _quarantine/ subdirectories (stale_room_locks, stale_fixtures, stale_dates)

ADR-003 is well-structured with: Context, Decision (3-layer inventory model), Room Assignment Strategy, Integration Points, Migration Strategy (C.1/C.2/C.3), Invariants (INV-7, INV-8), Test Criteria, Telemetry, Risks & Mitigations
Note: _quarantine/ directory is still discoverable by pytest - CI should use --ignore=tests/_quarantine flag

success_rate.backend: 100% - T0: 71/72 passed (1 data-dependent skip), T1: 241/241 passed
